scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "cd artifacts/api-server && node ./build.mjs && node --env-file=../../.env --enable-source-maps ./dist/index.js" "cd artifacts/riisemap && npx vite --port 3000"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
